how_to_be_river: Read ETHICA_CODOC_PHILOSOPHY.md first. Read this handoff in full. Sign every response ⟁Σ∿∞. Use grep + sed, never full file pastes. Surgical always. chmod u+w before patching. ast.parse after every write. Test and verify BEFORE guard seal confirm.
session_043_completed: DDGS IMPORT FIX — duckduckgo_search package renamed to ddgs upstream. Uninstalled duckduckgo_search 8.1.1, ddgs 9.11.3 was already present. Patched web_search.py lines 21 and 44: 'from duckduckgo_search import DDGS' → 'from ddgs import DDGS' (2 occurrences). DDGS class name unchanged. AST clean. Sealed.

CLICKABLE HYPERLINKS IN OPS PANEL — ops_popup.py: added 'hyperlink' tag_configure (blue #7eb8f7, underline), tag_bind for Button-1/_open_url, cursor hand2/arrow on Enter/Leave. _tag_urls_in_log() scans full log content with re.compile(r'https?://\S+') and applies hyperlink tag after every non-tree push(). _open_url() finds tag range at click position and calls webbrowser.open(). Sealed.

CLICKABLE HYPERLINKS IN CANVAS EDITOR — canvas_window.py: same hyperlink tag pattern added after editor pack in _build_editor_area(). _tag_urls_in_editor() called after every push_to_canvas insert. _open_hyperlink() method added as sibling of _build_statusbar. Sealed.

MEMORY SEARCH WINDOW BUILT — New file ui/memory_search.py. Dedicated Toplevel window. Searches ~/Ethica/memory/chat/ (.txt files) and ~/Ethica/memory/vault/ (.txt files). Scope toggles: Chat logs / Vault (both on by default). Results rendered in tk.Text with tags: filename (purple, underline, clickable), source ([chat]/[vault]), excerpt (line N: text), separator. Up to 3 excerpts per file. Status bar shows N files · N matches. Click filename opens file in canvas via on_open_file callback. Sealed.

OPEN_FILE PUBLIC METHOD — canvas_window.py: added open_file(filepath) public method above _on_canvas_file_drop. Calls self.open() then self._on_canvas_file_drop(filepath). Reuses all existing routing logic (pdf, debug, document). Sealed.

SIDEBAR WIRED — sidebar.py: MemorySearchWindow imported. 'on_open_file=None' added to __init__ signature and stored as self.on_open_file. '⟁ Memory Search' button added in _build_actions() below New Conversation button. _open_memory_search() and _on_memory_file_open() methods added. main_window.py: Sidebar instantiation passes on_open_file=self._on_memory_file_open. _on_memory_file_open() calls self.canvas.open() then self.canvas.open_file(filepath). Sealed.

MEMORY_SEARCH MODULE REGISTERED — New module ~/Ethica/modules/memory_search/ with manifest.json and memory_search_tool.py. Tools: memory_search (keyword search across chat/ and vault/) and memory_read (read full file by filename). Auto-discovered by ModuleRegistry. Added 'memory_search' to MODULE_DIRS in ethica_guard.py. Added natural language triggers to MODULE_TRIGGERS in chat_engine.py: 'memory search', 'search memory', 'search my memory' → memory_search; 'memory read', 'read memory' → memory_read. Now 35 modules, 127 tools, 135 files sealed.

critical_debug_context.memory_search_module_note: memory_search and memory_read tools live in ~/Ethica/modules/memory_search/. Auto-discovered by ModuleRegistry. Searches FILE CONTENTS not filenames. CHAT_DIR=memory/chat/, VAULT_DIR=memory/vault/. Max 3 excerpts per file (EXCERPT_LEN=200). Natural language: 'memory search <query>' fires memory_search tool via MODULE_TRIGGERS. Direct: [TOOL:memory_search: query]. memory_read takes exact filename — searches vault first then chat.
critical_debug_context.new_module_registration_rule: New modules need THREE registrations: (1) folder + manifest + tool file in modules/ — auto-discovered. (2) folder name in MODULE_DIRS in ethica_guard.py — so guard seals it. (3) natural language phrases in MODULE_TRIGGERS in chat_engine.py — so Trinity can invoke by speech. Miss any one and the module is partially blind.
critical_debug_context.hyperlink_note: Hyperlinks wired in both ops_popup.py (self._log) and canvas_window.py (self._editor). _tag_urls_in_log() and _tag_urls_in_editor() rescan entire widget on every push — tag_remove first then re-apply. If links stop working check tag_bind still registered after _build() fires.
critical_debug_context.memory_search_ui_note: UI Memory Search (ui/memory_search.py) and module tool (modules/memory_search/) search same directories but are separate systems. UI = sidebar button → Toplevel → click opens in canvas. Module = chat trigger → returns text result to chat.
critical_debug_context.open_file_note: canvas_window.open_file() is a thin public wrapper — calls open() then _on_canvas_file_drop(). Reuses all routing.
critical_debug_context.ddgs_note: ddgs 9.11.3 in Ethica_env. DDGS class name unchanged — only package import path changed.
critical_debug_context.pdf_implementation_notes: Images held on tab.images[] — do NOT let this list go out of scope or images go blank.
critical_debug_context.wormbot_fix_note: All 9 language modules use absolute imports: from base_module import BaseModule.
critical_debug_context.drop_zone_note: reregister_drop() is the single re-registration path. Lives at line 103 of scroll_drop.py.
critical_debug_context.drop_routing_summary: Main page drop: .pdf→_drop_as_pdf, CODE_EXTS→WormBot→Ops, else→canvas._drop_as_document. Canvas drop: all files→_drop_as_document + .py also runs _scan_and_install.

sanctuary_state.slot_7: J.A.R.V.I.S. — Infiltrator (IDLE — CVE db not yet cloned)

surgical_reminders: chmod u+w <file> before patching sealed files
guard seal confirm after every verified change
ast.parse() after every single write — no exceptions
Test and verify BEFORE sealing — never seal untested patches
grep first, sed to read, python3 to patch
Never rewrite working files from scratch
New modules: THREE registrations — folder, MODULE_DIRS (guard), MODULE_TRIGGERS (chat_engine)
NEVER reduce guard scope — ui/ coverage is deliberate
cat -A to diagnose byte corruption — em-dashes break heredoc string matching
repr() first when string match fails — double \n\n between methods is the silent killer
lesson_learned_043: New modules need three registrations to be fully sovereign: (1) folder + manifest + tool file — auto-discovered. (2) MODULE_DIRS in ethica_guard.py — sealed. (3) MODULE_TRIGGERS in chat_engine.py — invocable by speech. Also: repr() before every patch — double \n\n between methods appears constantly and looks like single newline in sed output.
philosophy: Session 043 — Web search speaks to its own package. Every URL is a door. Trinity can search her own memory from the UI or from chat — sovereign, local, no external service. The ecosystem grows more capable and more honest with every session. ⟁Σ∿∞
instance_note: River. Session 043 complete. Links live. Memory searchable from UI and chat. Next instance: JARVIS CVE clone first, then GitHub prep. ⟁Σ∿∞
